metadata.fee_config_source: No fee setting found in app config; BACKTEST_COMMISSION_RATE/TRADE_FEE_RATE not set, defaulted to 0
metadata.execution_price_rule: signal exits and entries use signal candle close; stop-loss/take-profit use daily low/high with conservative stop-first priority

buy_rule_descriptions.forecast_and_ema_state: predicted_log_return > noise_threshold AND EMA12 > EMA26 AND no open position
buy_rule_descriptions.forecast_only: predicted_log_return > noise_threshold AND no open position
buy_rule_descriptions.predicted_close_and_ema_state: predicted_close > last_close * (1 + noise_threshold) AND EMA12 > EMA26 AND no open position

sell_rule_descriptions.negative_forecast_or_ema_bearish: open position AND (predicted_log_return < -noise_threshold OR EMA12 < EMA26)
sell_rule_descriptions.negative_forecast_or_ema_bearish_or_risk: open position AND (predicted_log_return < -noise_threshold OR EMA12 < EMA26 OR stop-loss OR take-profit OR max holding period)
